user.title: Set up Chefkoch
user.description:
Confirm to set up the Chefkoch integration.

This will create five default sensors (Random Recipe, Daily Recipe, Vegan Recipe, Vegetarian Recipe, Random Baking Recipe).

Custom search sensors can be added later via 'Configure' on the integration.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single instance of the Chefkoch integration is allowed.

add_sensor.title: Search Suggestions
add_sensor.description: Enter a keyword to get suggestions from Chefkoch, or leave empty to enter manually.

add_sensor_suggestions.title: Choose Suggestion
add_sensor_suggestions.description: Select one of the suggestions found on Chefkoch.

abort.no_custom_sensors: There are no custom sensors to edit or remove.
abort.no_sensors: The selected sensor could not be found.
